description: Score and rank durable recall candidates.
name: cognitive_recall

record_class.description: Filter by semantic | procedural | lesson; None searches all.

description: Evaluate grounded episode content for lesson/playbook promotion.
name: evaluate_lesson_candidate_tool

action.description: Action taken to address the problem.

evidence_refs.description: Optional file paths, URLs, or handles supporting the episode.

local_critique.description: Optional critique of the specific action taken.

outcome.description: Result of the action (success, failure, partial).

problem.description: Problem or situation the episode addressed.

description: Evaluate whether a memory candidate can be promoted safely.
name: evaluate_memory_candidate

candidate.description: Proposed memory text to score against promotion policy.

description:
Export MCP tool catalog markdown for folder-discovery.

Writes `.braindrain/mcp-catalog/<server>/tools/*.md` from hub_config external
servers plus native braindrain MCP tools. Use `rg` on the catalog before loading
heavy deferred servers.
name: export_mcp_catalog

dry_run.description: When True, return planned paths without writing files.

path.description: Project root for `.braindrain/mcp-catalog/` output. Default: current directory.

description:
Get list of all available MCP tools with their loading status.
Shows which tools are HOT (always loaded) vs DEFERRED (loaded on demand).
name: get_available_tools

description: Read latest dream consolidation status.
name: get_dream_status

description:
Return a cached snapshot of the host OS environment: identity, network,
shell, runtimes, editors, installed CLI tools, and agent behaviour hints.

Returns a ready-to-paste AGENTS.md block plus full structured summary.
name: get_env_context

refresh.description:
If True, re-run the OS probe and update the cache.
     Default False returns the cached result instantly.

description: Get observer event counts and latest activity.
name: get_event_stats

session_id.description: Filter stats to one session; None returns global stats.

description: Get memory metrics and durable record counts.
name: get_memory_metrics

description: Return current model provenance settings and effective defaults.
name: get_provenance_settings

description: Return provider boundary strategy for durable vs ephemeral context.
name: get_provider_context_policy

description: Return latest session summary or a specific session.
name: get_session_summary

session_id.description: Session to retrieve; None returns the most recent session.

description: Compact token-savings dashboard (estimated tokens, Claude-focused).
name: get_token_dashboard

description:
Session cost tracking: tokens saved, cost avoided, cache hits by module.
Call anytime to see BRAINDRAIN's impact on your token usage.
name: get_token_stats

description:
Initialize project memory artifacts used by continual-learning workflows.

Creates (if missing):
- .braindrain/AGENT_MEMORY.md  (migrated from .devdocs/ on first run if present)
- .cursor/hooks/state/continual-learning-index.json

Both paths are gitignored. This tool is idempotent and safe to re-run.
name: init_project_memory

dry_run.description: When True, preview artifacts without creating files.

path.description: Project root directory. Default: current working directory.

description: List recent episodes (optionally by session).
name: list_episodes

session_id.description: Filter to one session; None returns episodes across sessions.

description:
List available workflows with descriptions and token budgets.
Use this to see what automated tasks BRAINDRAIN can perform.
name: list_workflows

description: Health check - verify BRAINDRAIN is running
name: ping

description:
Generate a review plan before running a destructive workflow.
Use before: refactor_prep, ingest_codebase (large projects)

Note: This feature requires crit (Phase 3). Currently returns stub.
name: plan_workflow

args.description: Workflow-specific argument dict to include in the plan preview.

description:
Prime a project/workspace for AI agent use.

First run: detects current IDE/CLI, deploys minimal Ruler templates, writes
.braindrain/primed.json, initializes project memory under .braindrain/.
Subsequent runs: updates templates (if sync_templates=True), optionally syncs
subagent files (if sync_subagents=True), and re-applies.
name: prime_workspace

all_agents.description: Deploy full template and apply all configured agents.

bundle.description: Bundle manifest to use from config/bundles/<name>.yaml.

codex_agent_targets.description:
Optional relative target paths for codex subagent
file deployment. Default: [".codex/agents"].

compact_mcp_response.description:
If True (default), return a smaller dict so the MCP
client is less likely to hit ClosedResourceError on large tool results.

patch_user_cursor_mcp.description:
If True, also patch ~/.cursor/mcp.json with
serverName entries (fixes Cursor allowlist warning for user-braindrain).

path.description: Target project root. Default: current working directory.

sync_templates.description: Update existing .ruler files with timestamped backups.

description: Query durable records from Wiki-Brain.
name: query_facts

include_superseded.description: When True, include records marked superseded. Default: False.

query.description: Text search query; empty returns recent records.

record_class.description: Filter by semantic | procedural | lesson; None returns all classes.

description: Store a grounded episode candidate for future dream consolidation.
name: record_episode

action.description: Action taken to address the problem.

context.description: Background context relevant to the problem.

episode_id.description: Optional explicit id; auto-generated when empty.

evidence_refs.description: Optional supporting file paths, URLs, or index handles.

global_reflection.description: Optional broader lesson or pattern observed.

local_critique.description: Optional critique of the specific action.

description: Record durable memory-system metric events.
name: record_memory_metric

metadata.description: Optional extra fields attached to the metric event.

description: Append a machine-local model provenance event for audits and plan reports.
name: record_model_trace_event

actor.description: Agent or subagent name (e.g. coordinator, architect).

event.description: Event type (e.g. run, plan, audit). Default: run.

metadata.description: Optional extra fields attached to the trace row.

model_name.description: Model id override; empty uses effective model from host/config.

source.description: Provenance source label (e.g. manual, subagent). Default: manual.

description: Record an observer event into the episodic ring buffer.
name: record_observer_event

files_touched.description: Optional list of file paths modified in this event.

metadata.description: Optional extra structured fields for the event.

session_id.description: Session identifier linking events to a work session.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp; default is current time.

tool_name.description: Optional MCP tool name when event_type is tool-related.

description: Append a schema 1.0 token checkpoint to `.braindrain/token-metrics.jsonl`.
name: record_token_checkpoint

note.description: Optional human-readable summary of what triggered the checkpoint.

path.description:
Project root directory (not the JSONL path). Default: current working directory.
  Checkpoints write to <path>/.braindrain/token-metrics.jsonl.

phase.description: Checkpoint phase — start | pre_high_cost | post_high_cost | milestone_close | end.

task.description: Short task identifier for this checkpoint row.

description:
Re-run the full OS environment probe and update the cached snapshot.

Run this when:
- You've installed new tools or changed your shell config
- You've switched machines or changed your network
- The cached data feels stale

Returns the fresh AGENTS.md block and structured summary.
name: refresh_env_context

description: Review active lesson/playbook records.
name: review_playbook

query.description: Optional text filter for lesson content.

description:
Route large text outputs through context-mode's FTS5 index to avoid dumping
raw bytes into the model context window.
name: route_output

force_index.description: When True, always index regardless of size.

force_inline.description: When True, skip auto-routing and return inline text when allowed.

intent.description: Optional intent tag for context-mode indexing.

min_chars.description: Character threshold before routing (when auto-route is off). Default: 5000.

source.description: Source label stored with the index entry. Default: braindrain.

text.description: Content to route or return inline when below threshold.

description: Run Light/REM/Deep memory consolidation.
name: run_dream

force.description: When True, run even if interval guard would skip. Default: False.

mode.description: Dream cycle mode — light | rem | deep | full. Default: full.

description:
Execute a workflow in an isolated sandbox. Returns only final summary.
Intermediate data NEVER enters your context window.
name: run_workflow

args.description: Workflow-specific argument dict (see hub_config workflows input_examples).

name.description: Workflow id from list_workflows() (e.g. ingest_codebase, refactor_prep).

description: Pin or upgrade a shared script artifact in the current workspace.
name: scriptlib_apply_update

approved.description: When True, confirm update approval gate. Default: False.

channel.description: Optional release channel to pin (e.g. stable).

dry_run.description: When True, preview update without writing. Default: False.

path.description: Project root. Default: current working directory.

script_id.description: Shared scriptlib entry id to pin or upgrade.

target_revision.description: Optional explicit revision number to pin.

description: Summarize local/shared scriptlib state, promotion candidates, pins, and updates.
name: scriptlib_catalog_status

include_entries.description: When True, include entry summaries in response. Default: False.

limit.description: Max entries when include_entries is True. Default: 20.

path.description: Project root. Default: current working directory.

description: Return full metadata for a scriptlib entry.
name: scriptlib_describe

path.description: Project root for project-scoped lookup. Default: current directory.

script_id.description: Scriptlib entry id from search or catalog.

variant.description: Optional variant/version id when multiple exist.

description: Disable scriptlib for the project or global scope without removing harvested files.
name: scriptlib_disable

dry_run.description: When True, preview without writing config. Default: False.

path.description: Project root directory. Default: current working directory.

scope.description: Disable target — project | global. Default: project.

description: Enable scriptlib for the project or global scope. Project enable harvests scripts by default.
name: scriptlib_enable

dry_run.description: When True, preview without writing config. Default: False.

harvest.description: When True, harvest workspace scripts on project enable. Default: True.

path.description: Project root directory. Default: current working directory.

scope.description: Enable target — project | global. Default: project.

description: Fork an existing scriptlib entry into a new version for safe modification.
name: scriptlib_fork

new_variant_or_version.description: New variant or version label for the fork.

path.description: Project root for project-scoped catalog. Default: current directory.

script_id.description: Source scriptlib entry id to fork.

description: Copy useful script-like files from the workspace into the local scriptlib catalog.
name: scriptlib_harvest_workspace

dry_run.description: When True, report candidates without copying. Default: False.

path.description: Project root to harvest from. Default: current working directory.

description: List pinned shared script artifacts with available updates for this workspace.
name: scriptlib_list_updates

path.description: Project root. Default: current working directory.

description: Promote a validated project script into the shared personal scriptlib catalog.
name: scriptlib_promote

approved.description: When True, confirm promotion approval gate. Default: False.

channel.description: Release channel (e.g. stable, beta). Default: stable.

dry_run.description: When True, preview promotion without writing. Default: False.

path.description: Project root. Default: current working directory.

script_id.description: Project scriptlib entry id to promote.

description: Record a run result and update success score, mistakes, and validation state.
name: scriptlib_record_result

notes.description: Optional freeform notes about the run.

path.description: Project root for project-scoped catalog. Default: current directory.

script_id.description: Scriptlib entry id that was run.

validate_native_copy.description: When True, validate the native copy artifact. Default: False.

variant.description: Optional variant/version id that was run.

description: Rebuild project, global, or combined scriptlib indexes and catalogs.
name: scriptlib_refresh_index

dry_run.description: When True, preview rebuild without writing. Default: False.

path.description: Project root for project scope. Default: current working directory.

scope.description: Index scope — project | global | all. Default: project.

description: Run a scriptlib entry using native copy or restored source context.
name: scriptlib_run

args.description: Optional CLI arguments passed to the script.

dry_run.description: When True, return the command without executing. Default: False.

path.description: Project root for project-scoped lookup. Default: current directory.

timeout_seconds.description: Max execution time in seconds. Default: 60.

description: Refresh indexes, surface duplicates and promotion candidates, and optionally persist ignore dirs.
name: scriptlib_run_maintenance

add_ignore_dirs.description: Optional directory names to add to harvest ignore list.

dry_run.description: When True, report findings without writing. Default: False.

path.description: Project root. Default: current working directory.

scope.description: Maintenance scope — project | global | all. Default: all.

description: Search project and global scriptlib entries with lightweight lexical ranking.
name: scriptlib_search

harness.description: Optional filter by test harness type.

language.description: Optional filter by language (e.g. python, bash).

path.description: Project root for project-scoped catalog. Default: current directory.

description:
Convenience wrapper for context-mode ctx_search.
Use when you have a handle/source and want to retrieve only relevant chunks.

Primary retrieval is context-mode FTS5 — no embedding API required.
name: search_index

limit.description: Maximum number of chunks to return. Default: 5.

rerank.description: Override rerank_on_search from config. None uses hub_config default.

description:
Search available tools by capability. Call this FIRST before any task.
Returns lightweight references (~300 tokens total), not full definitions.
name: search_tools

top_k.description: Maximum number of matching tools to return. Default: 5.

description: Store a durable semantic/procedural/lesson record.
name: store_fact

content.description: Durable fact or lesson body text to store.

evidence_refs.description: Optional file paths, URLs, or index handles supporting the record.

metadata.description: Optional extra structured fields stored with the record.

record_class.description: Record type — semantic | procedural | lesson. Default: semantic.

source.description: Provenance label (e.g. manual, dream, session). Default: manual.

title.description: Optional short title for the record.

description:
Update session summary telemetry.

Set end_session=true to finalize and emit a ≤2 KB compact package.
name: touch_session

end_session.description: When True, finalize session and emit compact package.

error.description: Optional error message if a failure occurred.

files_modified.description: Optional list of file paths changed this touch.

index_in_context_mode.description: When True and end_session, index package via context-mode.

key_decision.description: Optional short decision note to append.

open_todos.description: Optional list of remaining todo strings.

session_id.description: Unique session identifier for this work session.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp override; default is current time.

token_delta.description: Token count delta to add to session total. Default: 0.

tool_name.description: Optional last tool invoked in this touch.
